name: Bounce Pickle Biddeford
about: Bounce Pickle & Play is a multi-sport venue in Biddeford, Maine, featuring six indoor pickleball courts and three top-of-the-line golf simulator bays. It operates as a social hub with a lively sports bar, offering casual play, private events, and community gatherings. The facility provides flexible booking options, including drop-in sessions and hourly bay rentals, catering to both members and non-members. With a focus on accessibility and diverse activities, it serves players of all skill levels seeking a blend of sports and social entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulators with real-time tracking and feedback
Flexible hourly booking with advance reservations up to 7 days
Variety of course and game options to keep skills sharp
Social atmosphere with a full bar and sports viewing

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen at Match Point Kitchen + Sports Bar with a crowd-pleasing menu
Full bar available at Match Point Kitchen + Sports Bar

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the simulator experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned, but the venue has an on-site kitchen and full bar at Match Point Kitchen + Sports Bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify the duration for 18 holes, but simulators typically allow for flexible play times based on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bounce is family-friendly and hosts events suitable for kids, including birthday parties and family play sessions.
